name: sparse_mla_sm120_paged_h32_dqk512_dv512_topk512_ps64_kvb584
description: Sparse-MLA paged attention on SM120. Single byte-packed FP8 KV cache + per-token top-K paged slot IDs + optional attn_sink (per-head pre-softmax bias). Auto-dispatches decode (num_tokens <= 64) vs prefill internally. Wraps BatchSparseMLAPagedAttentionWrapper.run() / sparse_mla_sm120_paged_attention().

num_heads.description: Number of query heads after TP split.

head_dim_qk.description: Query head dim. 512 = DSv4 family, 576 = DSv3.2 family.

head_dim_v.description: Value head dim. 512 for both DSV3_2 and DSV4.

topk.description: Number of top-K paged slots per query token.

page_block_size.description: KV cache page block size (64 for both DSV4 and DSV3_2).

num_pages.description: Total allocated pages in the KV cache.

kv_bytes_per_token.description: Byte-packed FP8 token stride (weights + interleaved scales).

kv_cache.description: Paged main KV cache. Byte-packed FP8 (weights + interleaved scales). The h_kv=1 axis is kept for shape compatibility with FlashMLA layouts.

indices.description: Paged slot IDs per query token. -1 marks invalid / out-of-window.

out_lse.description: In-place log-sum-exp (2-based; merges attn_sink when present).

topk_length.description: Effective top-k length per query token. Required for sliding-window MLA near sequence start; None for uniform top-k.

attn_sink.description: Per-head learnable bias added pre-softmax. FlashMLA V4 convention: output *= sigmoid(lse - sink) and lse' = log(exp(lse) + exp(sink)).

output.description: Attention output (also mutated in place above).
